title: Add opt-in live provider smoke
goal: Add an opt-in live-provider smoke path for jcode-harness run with strict credential isolation and no network calls by default.
requiredInputs: Need strict credential isolation for live provider smoke
permissions: Do not make live provider calls without explicit opt-in env and credentials; default validation must remain offline
completionConditions: Default e2e suite does not contact providers or require credentials
Opt-in live-provider smoke is available and skipped unless an explicit enable env var is set
Live smoke isolates JCODE_HOME, JCODE_RUNTIME_DIR, and cwd, and requires explicit provider/model configuration
Docs describe variables, credential boundary, costs/network risk, and safe command usage
Formatting, e2e/default validation, cargo check, and selfdev build pass
failureTaxonomy: Accidental live network call in default tests
notes: This continues the remaining next implementation slice from docs/SKILLS_HARNESS_STATUS.md. Do not run the live provider smoke unless explicit env enables it and credentials are configured.
